counters.description: he outranges you (and every other adc) by a lot, so fighting is often not possible. try your best to avoid his q's as they're the main source of his damage. avoid trading unless it's an all in, as there is close to no chance you'll be able to outtrade him (if you can even reach him in the first place), and ensure that you have your e or flash to disengage.

a very tough matchup for caitlyn. his e is about equal to your auto attack range, making it very hard to trade into him. avoid trading/fighting if at all possible, and ensure that you have your e or flash to disengage.

while you do outdamage seraphine, you'll almost never be able to hit her. she outranges you by quite a lot, and with her shields, heals, raw damage output, slows, roots, stuns and charms, she proves to be a very hard matchup for caitlyn. avoid trading as it will usually lead to you being cc'd and damaged out of your range, and ensure that you have your e or flash to disengage.

avoid trading unless you're ahead by a substantial amount (and can 100% win the fight), as he will always be able to beat you in an extended fight if left alive long enough. the standard build does a decent job of 100-0'ing kog'maw, so if possible play to reach at least 2 items before trying to take a fight with him.

avoid all in fights, as she will block all your auto attack damage (headshots included). she wins extended fights as well as all ins, so your best chance to win is to play around her auto attack blocking shield timer (around 20-30 second cd)

while caitlyn does outrange corki heavily, you need to always play around your e + q, as his gap closer can easily lead to you being one shot before you even have a chance to react. never trade if you don't have your e ready.

use your range to your advantage in this lane, but remember that you're highly vulnerable to his root.  he's a hard match up at all stages of the game and it's important to keep in mind his burst as well as his sustain in extended fights.
try your best to not let  her make it out of lane without putting her as far behind as possible. she will outscale you.
her spellshield makes it very hard for you to win trades, as she can block your (almost) guaranteed headshot that e provides you.
he outranges you, does very decent poke damage as well as all in / burst. play back and try to survive the lane.
hard to play against a good varus on almost any champ, however, with the right plays you can work around it. try to survive the early game and make sure to avoid his ults late game.

synergies.description: guaranteed stuns which help you get your full combo off.
if morg q lands, you will be able to get your entire combination off guaranteed.
bard is a strong pick with caitlyn, offering her healing, stuns, and a stasis which gives caitlyn a long time to set up multiple traps on enemies hit by his ult.
nami's bubble offers caitlyn a good amount of time to set up traps, alongside her ult for peel, heal for lane sustain, and e for bonus damage on attacks, nami is a strong duo with caitlyn.
his range can work well with yours as well. creating a hard poke lane that can lead to a big early gold lead.
similar to xerath, his range works well with caitlyns, while also providing much more peel for caitlyn.
taric is a hard champion to pilot, which makes this find an interesting spot on the list. i suggest playing taric lanes with a premade.
milio is a very strong pick for caitlyn, making her already long range even longer. providing shields, heals, and a built in cleanse.
similar to vel'koz, but with her root and knock up, its easier to land traps.
very bad. if you have the lp, just dodge lol.
not an awful pick, but your early game damage doesnt quite justify the blitz pick. thresh or naut work better with caitlyn.
she isn't a bad lane partner, but she doesn't offer exactly what you need when playing caitlyn.
not the best lane partner, but if he is able to land his stuns then you have a chance.
her buffs to your auto attacks are strong, and the shields and ult she is able to provide make her a decent lane partner.
she's an incredibly strong laner in general, but when paired up with caitlyn, her poke, shields, roots, and movement speed buffs prove to make laning against the duo incredibly difficult.

a very strong lane in lower elos. i don't see this lane having much strength in higher elo besides poking your opponents out of lane. even though lux has a root and slow, the abilities can be very telegraphed and easy to dodge, leaving caitlyn out to dry.
